_comment: Machine-readable corpus registry. Executable source of truth: metrics_lib.select_corpus (src/metrics_lib.py). Schemas: docs/architecture.md; prose: docs/dataset.md.

main30.notes: Legacy 30-game main batch behind the originally published numbers. Old demand-characteristic social_map wording, no probe chaining, no state.jsonl snapshots. The historical 'paper32' selector adds two pilot runs (one aborted).

en_demo.notes: EN demo corpus (2026-07-10, wave B1). Clean social_map wording, probe chaining, snapshots on. Mafia won 5/5. Game 36594b66 is the featured demo/screencast game.

ablation_demand.notes: Demand-phrase ablation arm: exact copy of config_deepseek.yaml except the OLD social_map wording. Matched arm: ru_clean. state.jsonl of f2510502 (151 MB, 15 rounds) is omitted from the public repo (GitHub 100 MB limit).

ru_clean.notes: RU clean-wording batch (config_deepseek.yaml post-fix) — the matched arm for ablation_demand.

corpus_v2.selector: forthcoming — ~250 RU games, generation in progress at snapshot time; game ids will be registered here in a follow-up release
corpus_v2.notes: Not yet included in the public dataset.

replay_forks.config: parent game's config (configs/config_en_demo.yaml for the 36594b66 experiment)
replay_forks.selector: game.jsonl setup record has forked_from != null (32 games: 2 pilot + 30 full-run forks of 36594b66)
replay_forks.notes: Counterfactual replay branches (src/replay.py, src/replay_experiment.py; docs/replay_experiment.md). Excluded from every corpus by metrics_lib.select_corpus.

corpus32.notes: Case-study corpus of the EMNLP 2026 demo paper (recomputed 2026-07-11): en_demo 5 + ru_clean 5 + first 22 completed games of the release generation; forks, feedback arm and demand-wording ablation excluded. Pinned manifest: this list is the exact N=32 set behind F1-F5.
